title: Reusable Travel Collage
sourceTitle: Algeria Passport Print Collage Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable travel collage poster with destination-led collage poster with landmark layering, cultural details, and campaign-style layout. Create a creative 1:1 square composition featuring two passport-style photo prints placed side by side and held between a person's thumb and index fi. Use the uploaded reference images for the two subjects. Preserve each subject's facial features, hairstyle, identity, and overall appearance accurately. Both passport photos should have a clean solid blue background and show the subjects wearing simple dark sweatshirts. Destination: Algeria. Traveler: curious solo traveler in relaxed linen clothing carrying a small camera. Landmark Set: Sahara dunes, Algiers white architecture, Roman ruins, and Mediterranean coastline. Culture Details: market textiles, mint tea, patterned ceramics, local food, and travel-stamp motifs. Poster Palette: sun-washed turquoise, warm sand, tomato red, deep blue, and cream. Title Text: ALGERIA. Subject: Make curious solo traveler in relaxed linen clothing carrying a small camera the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in Algeria. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use destination-collage layout with traveler, landmark cluster, culture details, signage, food, transport, and title zone. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in premium travel-poster or collectible travel-card design with layered local identity cues. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use sun-washed turquoise, warm sand, tomato red, deep blue, and cream. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Algeria Passport Print Collage Poster Variant 01

Both passport photos should have a clean solid blue background and show the subjects wearing simple dark sweatshirts. Destination: Morocco. Traveler: urban sketchbook traveler with woven tote and straw hat. Landmark Set: Chefchaouen blue alleys, desert gateway, tiled courtyards, and mountain silhouettes.
